summary: Comprehensive audit of /mira-demo against MIRA bibles and doctrines. Overall the implementation is STRONG - Profile-First Doctrine, contextual quick replies, voice integration, memory display, soul score are all working correctly. One data issue found: doggy_soul_answers.allergies not loaded in backend context.

minor.issue: Backend only loads allergies from preferences.allergies, but NOT from doggy_soul_answers.allergies. Lola has allergies stored in both locations - preferences.allergies: ['Dairy'] and doggy_soul_answers.allergies: ['beef', 'corn']. Only Dairy is loaded into context.
minor.fix: Add doggy_soul.get('allergies', []) to the allergy collection logic

action_items: Fix backend server.py ~line 2921 to also include doggy_soul_answers.allergies in pet context
critical_code_review_comments: Pet context loading is robust - uses preferences, doggy_soul_answers, soul, enrichments
Quick replies correctly use contextual API response over pillar-based fallbacks
Voice integration working with proper stop/play controls
Memory whisper ('I recall what Lola enjoys') shows learned context
Soul score (62%) displays correctly with growth animation

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All MIRA Bible/Doctrine features verified working

seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing test user with pet Lola
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive MIRA Bible audit completed. All major doctrines verified. One minor issue: backend doesn't merge allergies from doggy_soul_answers with preferences.allergies. Pet 'Lola' (id: pet-e6348b13c975) has: preferences.allergies=['Dairy'], doggy_soul_answers.allergies=['beef','corn'].

verified_features.P1_pet_context_loading: PASS - Mira loads pet profile data BEFORE responding. Shows 'Since I already know Lola is on non-vegetarian food and has an allergy...'
verified_features.P2_profile_first_doctrine: PASS - Uses pet-specific data (Lola's allergies, preferences) NOT generic breed info
verified_features.P3_contextual_quick_replies: PASS - Console confirms: '[QUICK REPLIES] Using contextual quick_replies from API: [Stick with kibble, Add home-cooked, Mix of both, Something else]'
verified_features.P4_voice_integration: PASS - Console shows '[MIRA VOICE] Triggering voice for response'. Voice toggle (lucide-volume-x) visible. 'Mira speaking... tap to stop' UI present
verified_features.P5_memory_display: PASS - Memory whisper 'I recall what Lola enjoys' shown. Soul traits (Glamorous soul, Elegant paws, Devoted friend) displayed
verified_features.P6_never_dead_end: PASS - Always provides CTA: 'View personalized picks for Lola', clarifying question offered
verified_features.P7_personalized_response: PASS - Uses pet name 'Lola', acknowledges allergies, mentions puppy-safe (she's still very young)
verified_features.P8_soul_score_display: PASS - Soul score 62% displayed prominently in pet avatar ring

mira_bible_compliance.ask_only_what_needed: PASS - Doesn't ask for known data, uses Pet Soul
